title: Mass Produced Evangelion in The rebuild series
display_title: Mass Produced Evangelion in The rebuild series
wikitext:
[]: Mass Produced Evangelion in The rebuild series?             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest. » Fri Jan 15, 2010 9:49 pm I was wondering, any one think that the mass produced evangelion from the end of evangelion will be in the rebuild of evangelion series? i was thinking if they are they will probly be in the 4th movie right? or hase any one heard any different? and if they are do u think they will own Asuka and Shinji agin lol? but wasent the mass produced evangelion like units 6-14? and now there is a unit 6, 7 and 8 and we already know the who the pilots are right?

[]: Re: Mass Produced Evangelion in The rebuild series?             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 15, 2010 9:58 pm NeverKnowsBest. wrote: hase any one heard any different?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jan 15, 2010 10:07 pm Wait.Wasnt only Unit 08 confirmed to appear?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Jan 15, 2010 10:12 pm Eva 04 wrote: Wait.Wasnt only Unit 08 confirmed to appear?

[]:             Quote Post by NeverKnowsBest. » Fri Jan 15, 2010 10:14 pm So far they got unit's 0-8 just the pilots for the last 2 are not decided... wich will mean if there are going to be mass produced evangelion and i dont know how many there will be it was origanelly 6-14 i thought but now it will have to be 8-? so only seeing the 4th movie will tell i guess -.-

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Jan 15, 2010 11:13 pm 1. I am not fond of new Evas.. 2. I hope they are so we can see rebuilt 02 -that is IF she gets rebuilt which I'm sure they will fight them. 3. I wish to see how Mari deals with them ahha.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Fri Jan 15, 2010 11:35 pm Joseph the PRPD wrote: Eva 04 wrote: Wait.Wasnt only Unit 08 confirmed to appear?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 16, 2010 5:37 am NeverKnowsBest. wrote: only seeing the 4th movie will tell...

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:15 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I wish to see how Mari deals with them ahha.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Sat Jan 16, 2010 2:20 pm I have a feeling they might appear in the 3rd movie, I have not seen 2.0 yet, but from what I have been told from the trailer at the end of the movie, then they might appear depending on what happens in the story.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Jan 16, 2010 3:40 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: 3. I wish to see how Mari deals with them ahha.

[]:             Quote Post by EVA X » Sun Jan 17, 2010 10:47 pm I wouldn't mind seeing the MP EVAs again.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:10 pm So, why exactly did they change the Eva design so drastically for the MPE's if Eva Unit 02 was supposed to be the PRODUCTION MODEL. I mean like, Eva's 3 and four thats understandable The whole genetic buildup thing but then it would seem that they mastered making Evas and completely redesigned it.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:14 pm wonderluster wrote: So, why exactly did they change the Eva design so drastically for the MPE's if Eva Unit 02 was supposed to be the PRODUCTION MODEL. I mean like, Eva's 3 and four thats understandable The whole genetic buildup thing but then it would seem that they mastered making Evas and completely redesigned it.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:20 pm . . . . . . . .TRUE.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:23 pm MP evas were designed after the S2 organ became viable. Thats why 03 and 04 were testbeds. Also, this has nothing to do with Rebuild.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 9:49 pm Back to the topic. I'm pretty surr that they will return. I mean they were such a huge part of EoE, they are almost like a mascot for that movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Mon Jan 18, 2010 10:05 pm Mad wrote: Back to the topic. I'm pretty surr that they will return. I mean they were such a huge part of EoE, they are almost like a mascot for that movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Mon Jan 18, 2010 10:10 pm This isn't EoE. But the MPs are important to the Eva Universe. It would make sense for them to return. However you are right, no one can know for sure. As for now, everything is just blind speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Mon Jan 18, 2010 10:14 pm they weren't needed for the tv ending...
